howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get your shop running on Kokonaat in five simple steps.

1.title: Create your account
1.description: Sign up in minutes and secure your workspace.

2.title: Set up your shop
2.description: Add your shop name and address to get started.

3.title: Record transactions
3.description: Log sales, purchases, payments, and receivables.

4.title: Track stock automatically
4.description: Inventory updates with every sale and purchase.

5.title: View ledgers and export reports
5.description: Customer and vendor balances, PDF/Excel in Bengali or English.

languageSection.title: Works in English and Bengali
languageSection.description: Switch language anytime. Reports, labels, and the admin app support full Bengali — including PDF exports with Bengali fonts.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your shop. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for getting started with basic shop management.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing shops that need more capacity and flexibility.

max.name: Max
max.description: For high-volume businesses with large transaction needs.

1.question: Is Kokonaat available in Bengali?
1.answer: Yes. The admin app and PDF/Excel exports support full Bengali. Switch language from the header at any time.

2.question: Can I manage multiple shops?
2.answer: Yes. Create multiple shops under one account and switch between them from the sidebar.

3.question: What reports can I export?
3.answer: Customer ledger, vendor ledger, transaction report, stock report, stock track, expense report, and balance sheet — as PDF or Excel.

4.question: How do customer and vendor balances work?
4.answer: Sales and receivables track what customers owe you (পাওনা). Purchases and payments track what you owe vendors (দেনা).

5.question: Is there a free plan?
5.answer: Yes. The Free plan lets you manage up to 10 vendors, 10 customers, 30 transactions, and 50 expenses at no cost. Pro and Max plans unlock higher limits.
